title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
